theme: growing coral to hold a lighthouse
title: Reef Cradle: Growing Coral to Hold a Lighthouse
strategies: trivial: reproduce the checker's own per-mound independent straight-conduit reference layout (no sharing, no widening)

greedy: connect each new mound to whichever built point is nearest via a Chebyshev-looking diagonal-first shortcut (silently corner-only / disconnected whenever the nearest point isn't row- or column-aligned), then dump all leftover budget into reinforcing the first mound's path uniformly

strong: grow one shared Steiner-style tree face-adjacent-only (fusing nearby mounds onto a common trunk instead of paying for each independently), then spend leftover budget tapering -- widening highest-combined-force trunk segments nearest the anchor first
invalid: leave the first mound's conduit one cell short of the mound itself, so the mound is never covered by material
